items.raw_desc: Társas Jungo:                Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain number of cards at the start, but the important rule is that they must not rearrange them in any way. The cards have a number from 1 to 8 or a pair of numbers on them. The player on the turn can play a card or set of cards to beat the one currently on the table. He can take the earned stitch or throw it away. If the player cannot or will not fold, he draws a card from the deck. The first to get rid of the cards wins. Jungo delights with its interesting design and is suitable for up to 5 players aged 10 and up. The medication container serves as a reservoir for the medication and a source of inhaled aerosol. It allows you to accurately measure the amount of medicine you consume during inhalation. Replacement vials are particularly useful if you need to administer more drugs in a short time or if, despite careful hygiene and disinfection, bacterial contamination or contamination of the administered drugs has occurred, or if the vial is mechanically damaged. The ideal solution is also to change the containers regularly at least once every six months.
